params.name: SSB Trophy
params.description:
On June 2, 1345 A.D., the Dung Beetles won the inaugural Super Species Bowl.
The Species Super Bowl is a global football event featuring teams from various species on a unique multi-terrain field with grass, sand, water, and ice, using custom balls. Alongside the matches, cultural exchanges promote cross-species friendship. This event highlights competition and fosters biodiversity, international understanding, and respect, attracting millions of fans annually.
